name: 6" x 3" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle Cream - Threshold™
description:
Whether it's any day or a special occasion, this LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™ will add an elegant ambiance to your space. This flameless candle looks like pillar candle, with an LED bulb inside. Complete with a realistic black wick, this white candle will add a warm and inviting touch to your decor. Pair with candles of different heights and mix in with other decorative elements for a cool look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
